title: biscutella longifolia subsp. angustifolia
intro: Biscutella longifolia subsp. angustifolia is a subspecies of the Biscutella longifolia plant, also known as the alpine biscuitroot, a perennial plant in the brassicaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Biscutella longifolia subsp. angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
